description: Specifies taper scale for extrude3d. Controls how the cross-section scales along the extrusion height. Single argument tapers from 1 to the given scale; two arguments taper from start to end scale.
utility: Set taper scale for extrusion solids

arguments.name: startScale
arguments.description: Taper start scale (defaults to 1 if only one argument given)

arguments.name: endScale
arguments.description: Taper end scale (0 = point/cone, 0.5 = half-size frustum, 1 = no taper)

alternates.description: Tapers from full size (1) to a point (0)
Tapers from full size (1) to half size (0.5)

examples.expression:
p = profile2d("rectangle")
E = extrude3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), p, 5, taper(0), c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))

p = profile2d("rectangle")
E = extrude3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), p, 4, taper(0.5), c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))

examples.scenario: Extrusion with explicit start and end taper
examples.expression:
p = profile2d("circle")
E = extrude3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), p, 6, taper(1, 0.3), c(crimson), fc(pink), fo(0.4))
